transcript:
Speaker A (Woman): ಅಣ್ಣ ಒಂದು KG ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ ಎಷ್ಟು? [Brother, how much for one KG of chillies?]
Speaker B (Man): It's ₹25 per kilo, ma'am. If you take 2 kilos, it's ₹40. You can pay via UPI.
Speaker A: ಅಣ್ಣ ಇಷ್ಟು ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [Brother, how are you speaking English so well?]
Speaker B: It is because of MySivi, ma'am.
Speaker A: MySivi? ಅದು ಏನು? [MySivi? What is that?]
Speaker B: ಹೌದು MADAM ಈ APP ನಲ್ಲಿ ಇರುವ AI TEACHER ನಮಗೆ DAILY STEP BY STEP PROCESS ಮೂಲಕ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ ENGLISH ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೆ. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 15-20 MINUTES ಕೊಟ್ಟರೆ ಸಾಕು MADAM, WITHIN 30 DAYS ನಮ್ಮ ENGLISH ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ IMPROVE ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. [Yes Madam, the AI Teacher in this app teaches us English from Kannada through a daily step-by-step process. Just 15-20 minutes a day is enough Madam, within 30 days our English will improve amazingly.]
Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ COSTLY ಆಗಿರಬೇಕಲ್ವಾ? ಹೇಗೆ MANAGE ಮಾಡಿದ್ರಿ? [But it must be very costly, right? How did you manage?]
Speaker B: ಏನಿಲ್ಲ MADAM, ನೀವು ಕೊಡೋ ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ RATE ಗಿಂತ ಕಮ್ಮಿ. ಬರಿ 1 RUPEE. TRIAL ಅಲ್ಲಿ APP ಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ USE ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. [Nothing Madam, less than the rate of the chillies you buy. Just 1 Rupee. You can use the app fully in the trial.]
Speaker A: SUPER ಅಣ್ಣ, ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ MYSIVI APP INSTALL ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ತೀನಿ. [Super brother, then I will install the MySivi app right now.]
Speaker B: MySivi APP INSTALL ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. ನಿಮ್ಮ ENGLISH JOURNEY ಯನ್ನ MADAM ತರ ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Install MySivi app. Start your English journey right now like Madam.]
Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text:
ಅಣ್ಣ ಒಂದು KG ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ ಎಷ್ಟು? [Brother, how much for one KG of chillies?]
IT'S ₹25 PER KILO, MA'AM.
IF YOU TAKE 2 KILOS, IT'S ₹40.
YOU CAN PAY VIA UPI.
ಅಣ್ಣ ಇಷ್ಟು ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [Brother, how are you speaking English so well?]
IT IS BECAUSE OF MySivi, MA'AM.
MySivi ಅದು ಏನು? [MySivi, what is that?]
ಹೌದು MADAM ಈ APP ನಲ್ಲಿ ಇರುವ AI TEACHER ನಮಗೆ [Yes Madam, the AI Teacher in this app teaches us]
DAILY STEP BY STEP PROCESS ಮೂಲಕ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ ENGLISH ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೆ [English from Kannada through a daily step-by-step process]
ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 15-20 MINUTES ಕೊಟ್ಟರೆ ಸಾಕು MADAM [Just 15-20 minutes a day is enough Madam]
WITHIN 30 DAYS ನಮ್ಮ ENGLISH ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ IMPROVE ಆಗುತ್ತೆ [Within 30 days our English will improve amazingly]
ಆದ್ರೆ ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ COSTLY ಆಗಿರಬೇಕಲ್ವಾ? ಹೇಗೆ MANAGE ಮಾಡಿದ್ರಿ? [But it must be very costly, right? How did you manage?]
ಏನಿಲ್ಲ MADAM ನೀವು ಕೊಡೋ ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ RATE ಗಿಂತ ಕಮ್ಮಿ [Nothing Madam, less than the rate of the chillies you buy]
ಬರಿ 1 RUPEE TRIAL ಅಲ್ಲಿ APP ಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ USE ಮಾಡಬಹುದು [Just 1 Rupee, you can use the app fully in the trial]
SUPER ಅಣ್ಣ ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ MYSIVI APP INSTALL ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ತೀನಿ [Super brother, then I will install the MySivi app right now]
MySivi APP INSTALL ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ [Install MySivi app]
ನಿಮ್ಮ ENGLISH JOURNEY ಯನ್ನ MADAM ತರ ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ [Start your English journey right now like Madam]
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI-animated skit where a vegetable vendor surprises a customer by speaking fluent English. He attributes his skills to the MySivi app, explaining its Kannada-to-English AI lessons and a 1-rupee trial. The ad ends with a call-to-action to install the app.
